data.headline: Miguel Torres — Buyer Specialist
data.tagline: Helping you find the perfect home in Central Texas.

items.title: Neighborhood Knowledge
items.description: Born and raised in Austin — I know every pocket, every school district, and every hidden gem.

items.title: First-Time Buyer Guidance
items.description: Step-by-step guidance through the buying process, from pre-approval to closing day.

items.title: Off-Market Access
items.description: My network of local agents gives you access to homes before they hit the public market.

data.title: Looking for a Home?
data.subtitle: Tell me what you're looking for and I'll help you find it.

data.bio: Miguel Torres is a buyer specialist with Santiago Realty, dedicated to helping families find their perfect home in the Austin metro area. With deep roots in the community and a passion for matching people with neighborhoods they'll love, Miguel brings local expertise and a personal touch to every transaction.
